patches.hypothesis: The method does not correctly handle cases where one of the complex numbers has NaN components, leading to incorrect result when adding.
patches.changes: Added checks for NaN in both parts of the complex numbers and return NaN if encountered.
patches.diff: Added checks for NaN in both parts of the complex numbers and return NaN if encountered.

patches.hypothesis: The method does not handle cases where either complex number has NaN values properly, leading to incorrect results.
patches.changes: - Add check for NaN value in this and rhs complex numbers, return Complex.NaN if either contains NaN.
patches.diff: - Add check for NaN value in this and rhs complex numbers, return Complex.NaN if either contains NaN.
